pr.title: [ALL-1887] Add Entra-backed Azure DevOps auth for enterprise
pr.body: Adds Azure DevOps support for OpenHands Enterprise using Microsoft Entra ID OAuth/OIDC rather than legacy Azure DevOps OAuth apps or PATs. ## Summary - add enterprise Azure DevOps configuration/env plumbing - add Azure DevOps to enterprise provider modeling, login/config discovery, and frontend provider surfaces - support Keycloak-brokered Azure DevOps token retrieval and refresh through `ProviderType.AZURE_DEVOPS` - add an enterprise Azure DevOps service for org/project/repo/branch discovery - clone Azure DevOps repositories with an OAuth bearer `http.extraheader` instead of embedding credentials in URLs - exclude nested `.venv` directories from Docker build context ## Validation - [x] Human tested these changes - `uv run pytest tests/unit/app_server/test_default_web_client_config_injector.py tests/unit/integrations/test_provider_immutability.py tests/unit/test_azure_devops.py` - `PYTHONPATH=.:enterprise uv run --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio --with freezegun --with python-keycloak --with httpx --with sqlalchemy --with asyncpg --with pydantic --with coredis --with limits --with posthog --with slack-sdk --with stripe --with resend --with prometheus-client pytest enterprise/tests/unit/test_token_manager_extended.py` - `frontend npm run typecheck` - `frontend npm run test -- __tests__/components/features/auth/login-content.test.tsx __tests__/routes/git-settings.test.tsx` - targeted `ruff check` for touched backend files - companion OpenHands-Cloud chart rendered/linted with Azure DevOps enabled - validated on `replicated-01`: Microsoft login via Keycloak Azure DevOps broker succeeded, OpenHands retrieved a `ProviderType.AZURE_DEVOPS` token, Azure DevOps repository search returned 200, and Azure DevOps branch search returned 200 for the test org/project/repo --- To run this PR locally, use the following command: GUI with Docker: ``` docker run -it --rm -p 3000:3000 -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway --name openhands-app-136e2c6 docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:136e2c6 ```
pr.author: ak684
